title: Nature's Carpet: Twigs 'n' Leaves
description: Nature's Carpet: Twigs & Leaves brings the forest floor to life, adding scattered twigs and leaves to grass textures for a natural, rustic feel.
body:
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2433c4d6f2fe1d0d4c7a7b165ebbc67e0daf979_0.webp) 

transforms the look of your Minecraft world by adding intricate details to grass textures. This resource pack scatters twigs, leaves, and natural debris across the grassy surfaces, creating a more immersive, forest-like atmosphere. Whether you're walking through lush meadows or dense woodlands, the organic elements bring a rustic, weathered charm to the terrain, making every outdoor scene feel alive and in harmony with nature. Perfect for players who love a realistic, earthy aesthetic in their Minecraft landscapes.

***

## **Support the work**

If you enjoy what I create, supporting the page helps me spend more time on updates, polishing features, fixing issues, and creating new content for future releases.

Every bit of support helps keep development going — thank you for making the next update possible.
